publishedAbstract: * Compliance Operator scans (e.g., ComplianceScan or ScanSettingBinding) fail to progress and remain stuck in ERROR or DONE ERROR phases. * The PersistentVolumeClaim (PVC) automatically created to store the raw scan results (e.g., worker-scan-raw-results) remains in Pending status indefinitely. * Checking the events of the affected PVC reveals that the volume cannot be provisioned by the bucket-based StorageClass: ~~~ $ oc describe pvc-n openshift-compliance Output snippet: Events: Type Reason Age From Message------------------------- Normal ExternalProvisioning 10s (x5 over 45s) persistentvolume-controller Waiting for a volume to be created either by the external provisioner 'openshift-storage.ceph.rook.io/bucket' or manually by the system administrator. ~~~
publishedTitle: Compliance Operator scan stuck in "Waiting for a volume" when using Ceph RGW (bucket) StorageClass in RHOCP 4
